title: A Heavy Silence
content: For a moment, the heavy silence in the room is absolute. The distant hum of the city seems to fade away. Thorne doesn't blink, but the muscles in his jaw tighten almost imperceptibly.||'You hear interesting rumors on the street, Detective. But rumors do not stand up in court, and they certainly don't protect you in dark alleys.'||He walks toward his desk and presses a button. 'This meeting is over. You've wasted enough of my time with children's stories.'

choices.text: Stand up and prepare to leave.
